source: Public Hong Kong thermal fuel mix context plus generic thermal generator engineering defaults
assumptions: Coal is dispatchable with higher emissions and slower flexibility; replace with plant heat-rate data when available.

source: Public Hong Kong thermal fuel mix context plus generic CCGT/OCGT engineering defaults
assumptions: Gas is dispatchable and more flexible than coal; replace with plant heat-rate data when available.

source: Public nuclear import context plus generic nuclear availability defaults
assumptions: Nuclear/import-equivalent energy is modeled as high-availability low-variable-cost supply.

source: Generic solar PV engineering defaults for non-dispatchable renewable output
assumptions: Solar availability is annualized; future solvers should use time-varying profiles.

source: Generic wind engineering defaults for non-dispatchable renewable output
assumptions: Wind availability is annualized; future solvers should use time-varying profiles.
Waste-to-energy treated as dispatchable thermal plant with moderate cost and emissions.
Used only when OSM/public tags do not identify generator source.

source: Public peak-demand capacity equivalent for CLP service territory plus synthetic supply cost default
assumptions: Equivalent supply is a modeling device for sparse topology and not a real generator unit.

source: Public peak-demand capacity equivalent for HK Electric territory plus synthetic supply cost default
assumptions: Equivalent supply is a modeling device for sparse topology and not a real generator unit.
Used only when a load-bearing island has no identified service territory.
